prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年湖南师范大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约3990名、5143名、4464名、3920名、4238名，整体呈波动走势，近两年在3920–4464区间内震荡 ，2025年基准位次约4238名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021年37人、2022年33人、2023年37人、2024年37人、2025年42人，2026年计划42人，与 2025年持平，未出现扩招或缩招。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第86名、2022年第88名、2023年第87名、2024年第86名 、2025年第88名、2026年第92名，排名稳定在中游211水平；2025年声誉评价为偏负面（文学院教授彭泽润公开羞辱求助学生事件），但事件影响范围有限；抖 音学校热度总排名第100位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等偏低；2021–2025年均无投档线断档或暴跌记录，录取走势相对平稳；第五轮学科评估中，外国语 言文学获评A-，为该校唯一A类学科，与招生专业中的外国语言文学类（含英语、俄语、德语、法语等）直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范 类、语言类专业社会热度总体平稳，计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、人工智能）热度偏暖；海南省2021–2026年综合类考生总数分别为52977、55945、61728、65969、6 7408、约78000人（2026年仅总人数，按近年均为综合类估算），2026年考生数较2025年增长约15.7%，竞争明显加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年 位次波动特征、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、本省考生规模大幅增加等因素，预计2026年湖南师范大学在海南省综合类录取竞争将有所加剧，最低位次在2025年基准4238名基础 上小幅后移；预测最低位次约4358名，位次区间3858–4858名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约4358名，区间3858–4858名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力选择，一档专业作为冲刺，三档专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如3858名以内）可重点 冲刺一档的汉语言文学、数学与应用数学等师范王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（4858名附近）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次要求较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hunan Normal University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 3990, 5143, 4464, 3920, and 4238, showing a fluctuating trend, oscillating within the 3920–4464 range in recent years, with a baseline ranking of about 4238 in 2025. The enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Hainan Province was 37 in 2021, 33 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 42 in 2025, with the 2026 plan also at 42, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 86th in 2021, 88th in 2022, 87th in 2023, 86th in 2024, 88th in 2025, and 92nd in 2026, maintaining a stable mid-tier 211 level. In 2025, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to an incident where Professor Peng Zerun from the College of Literature publicly humiliated a student seeking help), but the impact was limited. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranked 100th, with a rating of 'average' and moderately low short video exposure. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission cutoff line drops or crashes, and the admission trend was relatively stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Languages and Literature was rated A-, the only A-class discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Foreign Languages and Literature category (including English, Russian, German, French, etc.) in the enrollment majors, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher training and language majors is generally stable, while computer-related majors (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence) are slightly warmer. In Hainan Province, the total number of comprehensive category examinees from 2021 to 2026 was 52,977, 55,945, 61,728, 65,969, 67,408, and approximately 78,000 (2026 only total number, estimated as comprehensive based on recent years), with a 2026 examinee count increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating characteristics of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, and the substantial increase in the number of local examinees, it is expected that competition for admission to Hunan Normal University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category will intensify in 2026, with the minimum ranking slightly shifting backward from the 2025 baseline of 4238. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4358, with a ranking range of 3858–4858.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 4358, with a range of 3858–4858. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 3858), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as Chinese Language and Literature and Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, which are flagship teacher training programs. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 4858), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.
